universe.name: Aetheria
universe.description: A high-fantasy world of warring orders and old magic.

codexCategories.label: Factions
codexCategories.description: Orders, guilds, and powers that shape the world.

characters.name: Lyra Dawnwhisper
characters.description: An archmage of the Azure Order, exiled for a heresy she did not commit.

characters.name: Garrett Stone
characters.description: A knight-captain sworn to ${pl:silverhold}[Silverhold], torn between duty and conscience.

places.name: Silverhold
places.description: A fortress city carved into the white cliffs, seat of the Azure Order.

plotlines.title: The Shattered Crown
plotlines.description: The succession crisis that follows the old king's death.

events.name: The Contested Coronation
events.description: Two claimants are crowned on the same day within ${pl:silverhold}[Silverhold].

codexEntries.title: The Azure Order
codexEntries.description: An ancient circle of mages. ${ch:lyra-dawnwhisper}[Lyra Dawnwhisper] was once its brightest member.

stories.title: The Gathering Storm
stories.description: Lyra returns to Silverhold on the eve of the coronation.

approach.text: Rain lashed the white cliffs of ${pl:silverhold}[Silverhold]. ${ch:lyra-dawnwhisper}[Lyra] climbed the last stair to the gate, her cloak heavy with the storm. Seven years had passed since she last stood here, and the cold had not forgotten her.

the-gate.text: The gate groaned open before she could knock. A knight stood in the torchlight, one hand resting on the hilt of his sword. He made no move to let her pass.

challenge.text: You should not have come back, Lyra.

answer.text: And yet here I am. The coronation is tomorrow, and someone has to stop it.

the-threshold.text: Garrett held her gaze for a long, measuring moment. Then, slowly, he stepped aside. The open gate stood between them like a question neither of them was ready to answer.

stories.title: The Crowned Day
stories.description: Silverhold wakes to two crowns and one throne.

aftermath.text: Bells rang from both towers at once, each claiming the dawn for its own claimant. In the square below, ${ch:lyra-dawnwhisper}[Lyra] watched the crowds divide like a tide around two rocks.

connections.note: Hand-off: the next chapter is not written yet.
